Metadata.Title: Mock Active Directory Sites And Services Diagram
Metadata.Subtitle: Offline mock forest showing AD sites site links replication topology domain controllers and subnets
Metadata.Footnote: Site-link-derived arrows show possible topology relationships from AD configuration. They do not prove direct network reachability, active replication connections, or current KCC bridgehead selection.

ADSites.Notes: East regional office Subnets: 1. Domain controllers: 1. DN: CN=Branch-East,CN=Sites,CN=Configuration,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com
West regional office Subnets: 1. Domain controllers: 1. DN: CN=Branch-West,CN=Sites,CN=Configuration,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com
Cloud-adjacent network segment with automatic site coverage Subnets: 1. Domain controllers: 0. DN: CN=Cloud-Edge,CN=Sites,CN=Configuration,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com
Disaster recovery datacenter Subnets: 1. Domain controllers: 1. DN: CN=DR-Site,CN=Sites,CN=Configuration,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com
Primary datacenter and operations hub Subnets: 2. Domain controllers: 2. DN: CN=HQ,CN=Sites,CN=Configuration,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com

LineOfSightLinks.Label: DEFAULTIPSITELINK
LineOfSightLinks.Notes: Derived from AD site link configuration; not proof of active bridgehead replication. Contributors: DEFAULTIPSITELINK [IP, cost 100, every 180 min]

LineOfSightLinks.Label: Backbone-West-DR
LineOfSightLinks.Notes: Derived from AD site link configuration; not proof of active bridgehead replication. Contributors: Backbone-West-DR [IP, cost 50, every 60 min]

LineOfSightLinks.Label: Backbone-West-DR
LineOfSightLinks.Notes: Derived from AD site link configuration; not proof of active bridgehead replication. Contributors: Backbone-West-DR [IP, cost 50, every 60 min]

LineOfSightLinks.Label: DR-Cloud-Edge
LineOfSightLinks.Notes: Derived from AD site link configuration; not proof of active bridgehead replication. Contributors: DR-Cloud-Edge [IP, cost 200, every 120 min]

LineOfSightLinks.Label: Multiple site links (2)
LineOfSightLinks.Notes: Derived from AD site link configuration; not proof of active bridgehead replication. Contributors: Backbone-West-DR [IP, cost 50, every 60 min]; HQ-DR-Express [IP, cost 25, every 30 min]
